claim_boundary: Only target-time production rows can support source-position/source-strength trends; partial rows are supporting evidence only.

rows.scientific_question: Does the upstream internal source eventually produce outlet breakthrough over the full 40 ms window?
rows.next_action: Use as target-time evidence; rerun only for repeat seeds or longer windows.

rows.scientific_question: Does a downstream source reach the outlet faster than the upstream source under the same physical drag?
rows.next_action: Use as target-time evidence; rerun only for repeat seeds or longer windows.

rows.scientific_question: Does higher local source inventory intensify release or blockage without changing drag?
rows.next_action: Use as target-time evidence; rerun only for repeat seeds or longer windows.
